data.body: Done definition update: Story F scope decisions per-directory (the original scope 'skills/workflows/agents/CLAUDE.md' is too narrow): (1) .github/workflows/*.yml — UPDATE where they call absorbed scripts (inbound-bridge.yml, ticket-lifecycle.yml); (2) plugins/dso/docs/contracts/*.md — do NOT rewrite (contract docs are schema-truth and already covered by the docs/ path-scoped exclusion in the boundary hook); (3) tests/fixtures/doc-writer/* and tests/hooks/test-*.sh — preserve violator patterns where intentional (fixtures that test the old path are legitimate); add an inline suppression comment (e.g., # tickets-boundary-fixture) recognized by check-tickets-boundary.sh; (4) docs/adr/*.md — do NOT rewrite (ADRs are historical records of past decisions); (5) .gitignore — check each reference individually; most .tickets-tracker/ entries there are legitimate file-tree descriptions. [adversarial-review, blue-team accepted]
